creator: igorpopov@newmail.ru
text:
> You have to compile a new USB kernel with "options USB_DEBUG". My new USB
> stack has that flag set by default.
>
=20
Recompiled kernel with makeoptions DEBUG=3D-DUSB_DEBUG
# sysctl hw.usb
hw.usb.ehci.debug: 1
hw.usb.ohci.debug: 1
hw.usb.ugen.debug: 1

hw.usb.uhci.loop: 0

hw.usb.ukbd.debug: 0
hw.usb.ulpt.debug: 0
hw.usb.umass.debug: 1
hw.usb.ums.debug: 0
hw.usb.debug: 1

IOERROR on mount, so I have to turn of debug, unplug and plug usbdrive, mount
it and turn on debug. On file copying there were no kernel messages.
